_comment: Models advertised to Claude Code's /model picker via GET /v1/models. Copy this file to ultracode_models.json and KEEP ONLY the ones you have a plan/key for. RULES: (1) every id MUST start with 'claude' or 'anthropic' or Claude Code's discovery filter drops it; (2) 'display_name' is the picker label; (3) every id needs a matching route in ultracode_slots.json. real Anthropic models (claude-opus-4-8 etc.) already appear in /model on their own; you don't need to list them here.
